description: Embark on a delightful 6-day journey through the enchanting streets of Brussels and Bruges, where every corner reveals a new taste and a picturesque view. This trip is designed for food lovers and urban explorers alike, offering a perfect blend of gourmet experiences, charming architecture, and leisurely shopping. From indulging in rich Belgian chocolates to savoring the iconic waffles, your taste buds will be dancing with joy. Stroll through cobblestone streets lined with medieval buildings, and let the vibrant atmosphere of these cities captivate your heart. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure with your friends!

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Maison Dandoy, famous for its authentic Belgian waffles. Try the classic Liège waffle topped with fresh strawberries and whipped cream for a sweet treat!

Stroll over to the Grand Place, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and marvel at the stunning architecture of the Town Hall and guildhalls. This vibrant square is the heart of Brussels and a perfect spot for photos!
Enjoy a hearty lunch at Chez Léon, known for its moules-frites (mussels and fries). This bustling restaurant is a local favorite and offers a true taste of Belgian cuisine.
Take a short walk to see the iconic Manneken Pis statue. This cheeky little boy has become a symbol of Brussels and is often dressed in various costumes throughout the year.
Indulge in some of the finest chocolates at Pierre Marcolini. Sample a variety of pralines and truffles, and don't forget to pick up a box to take home!

Wander through the beautiful Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert, a stunning shopping arcade filled with luxury boutiques and charming cafes. It's a great place to find unique souvenirs and enjoy the elegant atmosphere.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at Café de Flore
activities.description: Take a break at the historic Café de Flore, where you can enjoy a cup of coffee and a slice of traditional Belgian cake. It's the perfect spot to relax and soak in the local ambiance.
End your day with dinner at Restaurant Vincent, known for its seafood dishes and classic Belgian fare. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service make it a great choice for a relaxing meal.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Maison Dandoy, famous for its authentic Belgian waffles. Enjoy a warm, crispy waffle topped with fresh fruits and whipped cream, a true Belgian delight!
Head to the iconic Atomium, a unique building and museum that offers stunning panoramic views of Brussels. Explore the spheres and learn about the history of this architectural marvel.

Indulge in a hearty lunch at Chez Léon, renowned for its moules-frites (mussels and fries). This bustling restaurant is a favorite among locals and tourists alike, perfect for experiencing authentic Belgian cuisine.

Take a leisurely stroll through the charming Sablon District, known for its beautiful antique shops and chocolate boutiques. Don't miss the chance to sample exquisite chocolates from renowned chocolatiers like Pierre Marcolini.

activities.activity: Visit the Royal Palace of Brussels
activities.description: Explore the Royal Palace, the official palace of the King and Queen of the Belgians. While the interior is only open to the public during the summer, the exterior and surrounding gardens are beautiful year-round.
Enjoy a casual dinner at Le Pain Quotidien, where you can savor organic dishes and freshly baked bread. The communal tables create a warm atmosphere, perfect for sharing a meal with friends.
End your day with a delightful chocolate tasting tour. Visit several local chocolatiers and sample a variety of chocolates, learning about the art of Belgian chocolate-making along the way.

transit.memo: Direct train from Brussels to Bruges.

activities.description: Start your day in the heart of Bruges at the Market Square, surrounded by stunning medieval architecture. Don't forget to snap a photo with the iconic Belfry of Bruges in the background!
Climb the 366 steps of the Belfry for a breathtaking panoramic view of the city. The climb is worth it, especially on a clear day!

activities.activity: Lunch at De Halve Maan Brewery
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at this local brewery, famous for its craft beers and traditional Flemish dishes. Try the 'Brugse Zot' beer with your meal!
Take a scenic boat tour through Bruges' picturesque canals. This is a relaxing way to see the city from a different perspective and learn about its history.
Indulge in some of the best chocolates Bruges has to offer at Choco-Story. Participate in a tasting session and learn about the history of chocolate making.
No trip to Belgium is complete without trying a waffle! Stop by Chez Albert for a freshly made waffle topped with your choice of delicious toppings.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll through the Historic Center
activities.description: As the sun sets, take a leisurely stroll through the charming streets of Bruges. The city lights up beautifully, making for a magical atmosphere.
End your day with a delightful dinner at 't Zwart Huis, known for its cozy ambiance and delicious local cuisine. Try the Flemish stew for a true taste of Belgium!

transit.memo: Short train ride to explore the beautiful city of Bruges.

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious Belgian waffle topped with fresh fruits and whipped cream at this popular waffle shop. It's a local favorite and a perfect way to fuel up for a day of exploration!

activities.activity: Visit the Basilica of the Holy Blood
activities.description: Explore this stunning basilica that houses a relic believed to contain the blood of Christ. The intricate architecture and serene atmosphere make it a must-visit spot in Bruges.

activities.activity: Lunch at De Halve Maan Brewery
activities.description: Enjoy a hearty lunch at this local brewery, famous for its craft beers and traditional Flemish dishes. Don't forget to try their signature beer, Brugse Zot!
Dive into the world of chocolate at this interactive museum. Learn about the history of chocolate, how it's made, and indulge in some tastings along the way!

activities.activity: Stroll through the Windmills of Bruges
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk to see the iconic windmills that dot the landscape of Bruges. The picturesque views and charming surroundings make for a perfect photo opportunity.

activities.activity: Chocolate Tasting at The Chocolate Line
activities.description: Treat yourself to some of the finest chocolates in Bruges at The Chocolate Line. Sample unique flavors and artisanal creations that will satisfy your sweet tooth!
End your day with a delightful dinner at this cozy bistro, known for its local cuisine and warm atmosphere. Enjoy a relaxing meal while reflecting on your day in Bruges!

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride from Bruges to Brussels.

activities.description: Visit the iconic European Parliament building and learn about the European Union's workings. The visitor center offers engaging exhibits and guided tours.
Savor a delicious meal at Chez Léon, famous for its moules-frites (mussels and fries). This bustling restaurant is a local favorite and offers a true taste of Belgian cuisine.

Stroll through the stunning Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert, a beautiful covered arcade filled with luxury boutiques, chocolate shops, and cafes. Don't forget to stop for some exquisite Belgian chocolate!

Explore the charming local boutiques around the area, where you can find unique souvenirs, handmade crafts, and stylish fashion items. It's the perfect opportunity to pick up something special to remember your trip.
Indulge in some of the best waffles in Brussels at Maison Dandoy. Their crispy, golden waffles are a must-try, especially when topped with fresh strawberries and whipped cream.
Enjoy a delightful dinner at La Roue d'Or, known for its traditional Belgian dishes and warm atmosphere. It's a great way to end your day in Brussels with a hearty meal.

transit.memo: Prepare for departure and enjoy some last-minute shopping.

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Maison Dandoy, famous for its authentic Belgian waffles. Try their signature Liège waffles topped with fresh fruits and whipped cream for a sweet morning treat.

activities.activity: Last-minute Shopping at Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert
activities.description: Stroll through the stunning Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert, a beautiful shopping arcade filled with luxury boutiques, chocolate shops, and cafés. It's the perfect place to pick up some souvenirs or indulge in more Belgian chocolates.

Enjoy a hearty lunch at Chez Léon, renowned for its moules-frites (mussels and fries). This bustling restaurant captures the essence of Belgian cuisine and is a great spot to relax before your journey.

Take a short trip to the Atomium, an iconic building and museum in Brussels. Explore its unique structure and enjoy panoramic views of the city from the top sphere. A must-see landmark that showcases modern architecture.
Unwind with a cup of coffee at the charming Café de Flore, a historic café known for its literary past. Enjoy the ambiance and perhaps a slice of cake as you reflect on your trip.
Make your way to Brussels Airport for your departure. Ensure you have all your souvenirs and memories packed as you conclude your delightful trip to Belgium.
